## Meeting Purpose

[Review account statuses, discuss new team structure, and align on processes for managing strategic accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Metadata account officially churned due to major cost-cutting; need to improve early detection of at-risk accounts](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [New team structure in place with Managing Directors overseeing account pods; still refining roles/responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Implementing new processes for strategic accounts (e.g. HeyJin) to ensure high-touch service and stakeholder relationships](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Developing SOPs and playbooks for programmatic SEO, conversions funnel, and client feedback loops](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Account Management

  - [New pod structure with Managing Directors (Dave, Jacob, Marcel) overseeing account groups](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Transitioning account ownership and kickoffs to Managing Directors](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Need to improve knowledge transfer and context sharing as team grows](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Implementing monthly retro process for churned accounts to capture learnings](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Strategic Account Management

  - [Identified key strategic accounts (e.g. HeyJin, Normal Security) based on growth potential and brand value](https://fathom.video/share/nsDCzzgbq8oamSDsRJ_iic-QnFjiUirh?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
